core_mechanism: an effective two-dimensional massless Dirac (relativistic wave) equation with a linear energy-momentum dispersion emerging as the low-energy description of a lattice, whose spectrum and transport are tuned by external fields, boundary/edge conditions, and perturbative modifications of the equation
brief_reason: The abstract describes low-energy excitations as Dirac-like electrons governed by a Dirac equation that is controlled by external electric/magnetic fields, sample geometry/topology and edge termination, with disorder entering as modifications to that equation.
